def positive_test_support_helpers_located_inside_production_package():
    rule_id = "test_support_helpers_located_inside_production_package"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test helper or factory file with _test_helpers.py or _factories.py suffix is inside the production package."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
